title: Make checklists truly collaborative
excerpt:
It would be great if all my team/team members I nominate could add additional items to a checklist. 
At the moment, I have to comment, ask the ‘owner’ to add something, or make changes, which really slows down our workfl…

posts.author: cfitz (C F)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if all my team/team members I nominate could add additional items to a checklist.

At the moment, I have to comment, ask the ‘owner’ to add something, or make changes, which really slows down our workflow.
